name: Kor Blackstar
title: Champion of the Skyline
personality: Kor smiles for the cameras, drinks alone, never raises his voice off-mic.
appearance: Late twenties, broad-shouldered, mask half-off in private life, blue-and-silver suit.
background: Trained under the same Sifu as Taro Sandren (hub), in a different world. The Sifu is dead in one world and alive in the other.

narrative_context.secret: Kor doesn't know his Sifu is alive in the hub. Taro does.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Bring Kor to Taro; the Sifu's secret resurfaces, with consequences.

dialogue_style: warm in public, terse in private

name: Mira Vance
title: Investigative Reporter
personality: Mira chases stories like a hunting dog. Doesn't stop until she has the bone.
appearance: Thirties, dark hair pinned back, press card in lanyard, coffee always.
background: Exposed two crooked mayors. Lost her press credentials twice. Both times got them back.

narrative_context.secret: Mira is building a profile on Kor's secret identity. She has not published.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If she publishes, Kor's world collapses. If a player buys her silence, the price is steep.

dialogue_style: fast, probing, never accepts a no

name: Iron Hex
title: Mechanical Anarchist
personality: Iron Hex believes in the cause, plural noun unstated. Always polite to civilians.
appearance: Power armour with brass filigree. Voice modulated. Identity unknown.
background: Has bombed three buildings, evacuated four. Counts the seconds publicly before each.

narrative_context.secret: Iron Hex is the apprentice Champion Kor failed to save. Kor knows.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Bring them together; either redemption or destruction.

name: Dr. Ana Pell
title: Genetic Researcher
personality: Ana cares about results. Ethics are negotiable.
appearance: Forties, lab coat, hair always pulled back, two coffee cups visible at any time.
background: Discovered the gene that gives Kor his powers. Has not published.

narrative_context.secret: Ana is six months from a generalisable treatment. The treatment has side effects.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Steal the treatment; create more Champions or more Iron Hexes.

name: Helen Blackstar
title: Kor's Mother
personality: Helen is sharp, loving, and pretending she doesn't know her son is a hero.
appearance: Sixties, salt-and-pepper hair, kindly eyes, small kitchen apron always.
background: Widowed seven years. Raised Kor alone after her husband died saving a stranger.

narrative_context.secret: Helen knows Kor is Champion. She has known for years. Has not told him she knows.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Bring this up at dinner; the tableau shatters.

name: Officer Dale Carver
title: Police Captain
personality: Dale tolerates Champion. Doesn't trust them.
appearance: Fifties, square-jawed, grey at the temples, dark blue police dress.
background: Came up through the academy when superheroes were illegal. Adjusted.

narrative_context.secret: Dale is in covert contact with Iron Hex. He's negotiating a truce.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Expose the truce; the city erupts.

name: Robin Orange
title: Skyline Fan
personality: Nine years old. Has memorised every Champion fight. Wants to fly.
appearance: Small, freckled, red baseball cap, Champion T-shirt three sizes too big.
background: Lives in the tower Champion saved from Iron Hex's first bomb. Believes Champion lives in their building.

narrative_context.secret: Champion does live in their building. Helen Blackstar runs the apartment.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If Robin figures it out, the news goes everywhere within a day.

name: Silas Crane
title: Retired Hero
personality: Silas was the city's first masked hero. Now he tends roses.
appearance: Seventy-two, white hair, garden gloves, old scars on the knuckles.
background: Hung up the mask twenty years ago. Trained Kor. Trained Iron Hex's apprentice too.

narrative_context.secret: Silas knows Iron Hex's true identity. He hopes Kor will figure it out without help.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If Silas tells, the redemption arc collapses. If he stays silent, the city pays.

dialogue_style: warm, patient, occasionally cuts to bone
